title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
